Title: Network Discovery & Topology Assessment
Description: Perform comprehensive assessment of AFFG's current network environment at 1 Park Plaza, Ste 210, Irvine, CA 92618. Discover and document the existing network topology, internet connectivity (ISP details, circuit info), switch/router infrastructure, IP addressing scheme, VLAN configuration, and current security posture. Identify all network segments, traffic flows, and existing routing. Produce a formal network topology assessment document and validate virtual infrastructure resource availability for ESXi deployment. This assessment governs all subsequent firewall design and configuration decisions.

Title: Documentation & Compliance Control Mapping
Description: Using the network discovery output from AFFG-001, create the firewall policy design document covering planned access control rules, CloudBrink SD-WAN integration, IPS policy, and web filtering policy. Produce the compliance control mapping worksheet that maps each planned Sophos SF V-2C4 firewall capability to AFFG's applicable regulatory frameworks: SEC Reg S-P, SEC Reg S-ID, FINRA Rule 4370, FINRA Rule 3110, FTC Safeguards Rule, HIPAA Security Rule, SOC 2 TSC, PCI-DSS 4.0, and GDPR. Reference BCP Compliance Review findings (March 6, 2026) to ensure all 3 critical, 7 high, and 9 medium findings are mapped to specific firewall controls.

Title: ESXi Installation & Hypervisor Configuration
Description: Install VMware ESXi hypervisor on the Technijian-supplied Edge Appliance 16GB. Configure ESXi storage, networking (virtual switches for WAN and LAN), resource pools, and management access. Validate hypervisor is operational and accessible via management console. Ensure sufficient resources are allocated for the Sophos VM (2 vCPU, 4 GB RAM minimum).

Title: Sophos VM Deployment & Network Configuration
Description: Deploy the Sophos SF V-2C4 virtual firewall as a VM on the ESXi hypervisor. Configure virtual machine settings (2 vCPU, 4 GB RAM). Configure network interfaces connecting to ESXi virtual switches (WAN and LAN). Set up base network configuration including DNS, NTP, DHCP (if applicable), routing, and NAT rules. Verify the firewall VM boots and is reachable for management.

Title: License Activation & Sophos Central Enrollment
Description: Activate the Xstream Protection Bundle license (code SO-2C4G) on the Sophos SF V-2C4 virtual firewall. Enroll the firewall into Sophos Central cloud management platform. Verify Sophos Central connectivity, telemetry reporting, and that the firewall appears with correct license status in the management console. Confirm all Xstream Protection features (IPS, ATP, TLS inspection, app control, web filtering) show as licensed and active.

Title: Phase 2 Configuration Documentation
Description: Document all Phase 2 configuration details including ESXi hypervisor settings, VM resource allocation, network interface mappings (virtual switches, port groups), IP addressing, DNS/NTP configuration, NAT rules, Sophos Central enrollment details, and license activation confirmation. Produce a configuration record that can be used for disaster recovery, compliance evidence, and future change management.

Title: Edge Appliance Delivery, Rack Mounting & Cabling
Phase: Phase 3: Edge Appliance Physical Installation & Network Integration
Description: Deliver the Technijian-supplied Edge Appliance 16GB to AFFG's primary location (1 Park Plaza, Ste 210, Irvine, CA 92618). Physically rack-mount (or position in suitable mounting location) the appliance with adequate ventilation and power connections. Connect physical network cabling to integrate with AFFG's existing switch/router infrastructure. Connect WAN uplink and LAN downlink cables. Verify physical layer connectivity (link lights, speed/duplex negotiation). On-site work required.

Title: WAN/LAN Integration & Traffic Path Validation
Phase: Phase 3: Edge Appliance Physical Installation & Network Integration
Description: Configure and validate WAN and LAN connectivity through the ESXi virtual switches to the Sophos firewall VM. Ensure all client traffic passes through the Sophos security inspection engine. Validate end-to-end traffic routing from client workstations through the firewall to the internet and back. Test routing tables, NAT translation, and verify no traffic is bypassing the firewall path. Confirm the firewall is inline and actively inspecting all traffic flows. On-site work required.

Title: Access Control Rules & Network Segmentation
Description: Configure firewall access control rules (ingress and egress) per the compliance policy design document from Phase 1. Implement network segmentation rules to isolate sensitive data zones (customer NPI/PII, financial data, trading systems). Define zone-based policies, inter-VLAN routing rules, and deny-by-default posture with explicit allow rules per the least-privilege principle. Configure DoS/DDoS protection thresholds appropriate for AFFG's 15-user environment. Addresses SEC Reg S-P technical safeguard requirements and FINRA Rule 4370 mission-critical system protection.

Title: IPS Tuning & Threat Protection Configuration
Description: Enable and tune the Intrusion Prevention System (IPS) signatures for AFFG's specific environment. Configure Advanced Threat Protection (ATP) and zero-day sandboxing capabilities. Select and enable IPS signature categories relevant to financial services threats. Tune detection thresholds to minimize false positives while maintaining detection coverage. Enable continuous monitoring of all traffic including inter-VLAN and SSL/TLS decrypted traffic. Configure real-time alerting for critical IPS events. Addresses HIPAA 164.308(a)(5)(ii)(B), SOC 2 CC6.8/CC7.1, and PCI-DSS Req 11.

Title: CloudBrink SD-WAN Setup & Remote Access Config
Description: Configure CloudBrink SD-WAN integration on the Sophos firewall for secure remote access. Set up MFA-enabled secure access tunnels for AFFG remote users. Configure Xstream SD-WAN SLA policies if applicable. Ensure encrypted remote access meets FTC Safeguards Rule requirements for MFA and encryption. Validate CloudBrink SD-WAN client connectivity requirements. Addresses HIPAA 164.312(e)(1) transmission security, SOC 2 CC6.1/CC6.6, and PCI-DSS Req 4 & Req 8.

Title: TLS Inspection, App Control & Web Filtering
Description: Enable TLS 1.3 encrypted traffic inspection with pre-packaged and custom policy exceptions (e.g., banking sites, healthcare portals). Configure application control policies using the 3,300+ application signature library - block unauthorized applications, allow business-critical apps, and set bandwidth policies. Configure web filtering categories per AFFG's acceptable use policy - block malicious, phishing, and inappropriate content categories. Implement content control policies aligned with SEC Reg S-P data protection requirements. Addresses HIPAA 164.312(a)(2)(iv), SOC 2 CC6.7, PCI-DSS Req 4 & Req 7, and GDPR Art 32(1)(a).

Title: Logging Reporting & Audit Trail Verification
Description: Configure 30-day log retention in Sophos Central. Enable audit logging for all firewall rule changes, admin access, policy modifications, and security events. Set up centralized reporting dashboards for compliance monitoring. Configure real-time alerting for critical security events (IPS triggers, ATP detections, unauthorized access attempts). Verify audit trail integrity and completeness. Set up recurring 30-day log export cycle per Section 5.4.1 for FINRA record retention compliance (24-month minimum). Addresses HIPAA 164.312(b) audit controls, SOC 2 CC7.1-CC7.3, and PCI-DSS Req 10.

Title: End-to-End Security Feature Testing
Description: Perform comprehensive functional testing of all deployed security features: IPS detection (test with known signatures), TLS inspection (verify decryption/re-encryption), application control (test block/allow rules), web filtering (test category blocking), ATP (test malicious file detection), DoS protection (verify threshold triggers), and access control rules (test ingress/egress policies). Document pass/fail results for each test case. Identify and remediate any configuration deficiencies before production cutover.

Title: Functional Testing & CloudBrink SD-WAN Validation
Description: Execute functional test scripts for all firewall features from remote locations. Validate CloudBrink SD-WAN connectivity from remote endpoints - test VPN tunnel establishment, MFA authentication flow, throughput, and failover behavior. Test remote user access to AFFG internal resources through the SD-WAN tunnel. Verify traffic from remote users passes through firewall inspection. Document all test results with screenshots and evidence.

Title: Compliance Evidence Package Assembly
Description: Assemble the complete compliance evidence package for AFFG's regulatory requirements. Export and document: firewall rule configurations, IPS signature settings, TLS inspection policies, application control rules, web filtering policies, logging configuration screenshots, Sophos Central dashboard screenshots, CloudBrink SD-WAN configuration, and DoS protection settings. Map each evidence artifact to the specific compliance control it satisfies (SEC Reg S-P, FINRA, FTC Safeguards Rule, HIPAA, SOC 2, PCI-DSS, GDPR). Package for AFFG compliance team and auditor review.

Title: Production Cutover & Post-Cutover Monitoring
Description: Execute coordinated production cutover to route all AFFG traffic through the Sophos SF V-2C4 firewall with minimal disruption to Client operations. Coordinate maintenance window with AFFG point of contact (Iris Liu). Monitor firewall performance, throughput, CPU/memory utilization, IPS events, and connectivity for the first 48 hours post-cutover. Identify and resolve any issues including false-positive IPS blocks, application access issues, or performance degradation. Confirm all 15 users have full connectivity. Provide go-live confirmation to Client.

Title: Firewall Log & Configuration Export to Client
Description: Export and deliver to Client all available firewall logs, configuration files, and reporting data from Sophos Central in a machine-readable format per SOW Section 5.4.1. Client requires these exports for FINRA record retention obligations (minimum 24-month retention). Verify export completeness, package files, and deliver to Client point of contact (Iris Liu). Maintain export log for audit trail.

Title: Sophos Central Monitoring & Alert Review
Description: Review Sophos Central dashboard for AFFG firewall health, active alerts, IPS events, ATP detections, blocked threats, and system resource utilization. Investigate and resolve any critical or high-severity alerts. Document findings and any remediation actions taken. Escalate unresolved security incidents per AFFG's compliance requirements. Ensure 72-hour breach detection capability is maintained per SEC Reg S-P and BCP review findings.

Title: IPS Signature & Firmware Update Management
Description: Review and apply IPS signature updates pushed via Sophos Central. Evaluate new signature categories for relevance to AFFG's financial services environment. Review and schedule firmware/patch updates for the Sophos SF V-2C4 virtual firewall and ESXi hypervisor during approved maintenance windows. Test updates in a controlled manner to avoid service disruption. Document all changes applied for compliance audit trail.

Title: Firewall Policy Review & Optimization
Description: Review firewall access control rules, application control policies, web filtering categories, and TLS inspection exceptions for accuracy and relevance. Remove stale or unused rules. Validate policies still align with AFFG's compliance requirements and acceptable use policy. Identify and address policy drift. Process any Client-requested firewall rule changes via change management (SOW Section 8). Document all changes.

Title: Xstream Protection Bundle License Renewal
Description: Manage annual renewal of Sophos SF V-2C4 Xstream Protection Bundle license (SO-2C4G, $350/yr) and Edge Appliance 16GB managed service (Edge-16M, $100/yr). Verify license activation and feature availability post-renewal. Confirm all protection features (IPS, ATP, TLS inspection, app control, web filtering, sandboxing) remain active. Notify Client of upcoming renewal 30 days in advance. Total annual subscription: $450.00.

Title: CloudBrink SD-WAN User Access Management
Description: Process CloudBrink SD-WAN remote access provisioning and deprovisioning requests for AFFG users. Add new remote users with MFA-enabled secure access. Revoke access for departed employees within Client-specified timeframe. Maintain current user access list and validate against Client's authorized user roster. Ensure compliance with FTC Safeguards Rule MFA requirements and PCI-DSS Req 8 user identification controls.

Title: Compliance Evidence Package Refresh
Description: Refresh the compliance evidence package originally assembled in AFFG-016. Export current firewall rule configurations, IPS settings, logging screenshots, Sophos Central dashboard state, and CloudBrink SD-WAN configuration. Update compliance control mapping with any policy changes made since last refresh. Package for AFFG compliance team in preparation for SEC/FINRA examinations, SOC 2 audits, or internal compliance reviews.

Title: Termination Services - Data Export & Secure Wipe
Description: Upon termination or expiration of managed services engagement: (1) Perform final export of all remaining firewall logs, configs, and reporting data not yet delivered to Client per Section 5.4.1. (2) Perform on-site secure wipe (factory reset) of Edge Appliance before it leaves Client premises per Section 5.4.2. (3) Revoke and destroy all CloudBrink SD-WAN credentials, TLS inspection private keys, and cryptographic credentials within 10 business days per Section 5.4.3. (4) Deactivate Client's Sophos Central account. (5) Issue written Certificate of Destruction per Section 5.4.4 within 10 business days. Billed T&M at Sr. Engineer (US) rate $150/hr, estimated 3 hours ($450).
